summary: Complete E2E testing of My Car Garage PWA delete functionality. BOTH delete buttons WORK CORRECTLY. Tested: Registration, Login, Add Car (Audi A7), Add Service Record (STK/Emise 2500 Kč), DELETE SERVICE RECORD, DELETE CAR. All critical features verified working.
passed_tests: Add car (Audi A7, Skoda Octavia tested) - WORKING
Add service record (STK/Emise, Výměna oleje tested) - WORKING
DELETE SERVICE RECORD - CRITICAL TEST PASSED - Service trash icon clickable, dialog appears, API returns success, service removed from list
DELETE CAR - CRITICAL TEST PASSED - Car trash icon clickable, dialog appears, Delete response status: 200, redirects to dashboard, dashboard shows 0 cars
Confirmation dialogs working (Czech text: 'Smazat tento servisní záznam?', 'Opravdu chcete smazat toto vozidlo?')
Dashboard correctly shows 0 vehicles after car deletion
Czech language UI throughout app - WORKING
No images in app as per user requirement - CONFIRMED
critical_code_review_comments: DELETE SERVICE RECORD CONFIRMED WORKING - Direct fetch with Authorization header in handleDeleteService works correctly
DELETE CAR CONFIRMED WORKING - Direct fetch with Authorization header in handleDeleteCar works correctly, API returns 200, redirects to dashboard
Both delete functions use proper error handling with specific messages for 401/404 errors
Console logs confirm: 'Deleting car: [car-id]', 'Token exists: true', 'Delete response status: 200'
No images in app - user requirement satisfied
test_credentials: Multiple test users created: test_delete_*, deletetest*, fulltest*, finaltest*, cardelete*, completetest* @test.com
seed_data_creation: Test cars (Skoda Octavia, Audi A7) and service records created and deleted during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All delete functionality verified working. User reported 'Car not found' error previously - FIX CONFIRMED WORKING. Service record delete uses direct fetch to /api/services/{serviceId} with DELETE method. Car delete uses direct fetch to /api/cars/{id} with DELETE method. Both include proper Authorization header. Dialogs show Czech confirmation messages. After car deletion, page redirects to /dashboard via window.location.replace('/dashboard').

rca_of_the_issue.previous_issue: User reported 'Car not found' error when trying to delete
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Direct fetch with proper Authorization header in handleDeleteCar and handleDeleteService instead of using api.js wrapper
evidence: Dialog appeared and accepted for both service and car deletion
Dashboard shows 0 vehicles after car deletion
Dashboard shows 'Žádné záznamy' (No records) after service deletion
